summary: Topic picker logic is duplicated across 6 files (~147 lines). Three assignment modes identified: interactive (full picker in /task and /meta), inherit (parent topic in --expand/--recover/spawn), and suggest (auto-infer from file path in /review and /fix-it). The active_topics maintenance jq snippet is copy-pasted verbatim 5 times. No flock is used; the convention is tmp-file atomic write. manage-topics.sh belongs in .claude/scripts/ and topic-assignment-pattern.md belongs in .claude/context/patterns/.

artifacts.summary: Research findings: all topic picker locations cataloged with line ranges, three modes characterized, script conventions documented, proposed manage-topics.sh interface defined
